case_title: KATHERINE NASH VS. MARTIAL YAPO ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT YAPO, MARTIAL ORDER SETTING HEARING FOR SEP-09-2015 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON SEP-09-2015 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT MARTIAL YAPO'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE WITH A DEFERRED PAYMENT THAT IS DUE BY 11/13/15. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
